title: picris humilis
intro: Picris humilis, also known as small hemlock or low hemlock, is a flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family. It is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and prevent infection. Herbal preparations of Picris humilis can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, and are often used to treat a variety of health issues, including fever reduction, skin conditions, and respiratory problems.
